top_signals.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
top_signals.summary: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Editor's Choice: Nvidia and Asia's three chip giants cash in on AI gold rush
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Flight Firm CAE Says Defense Deals, Cost Cutting to Drive Profit Surge
top_signals.summary: Shares of CAE Inc. slipped the most since August after the flight simulator firm unveiled a plan to increase operating income by 30% or more by 2030 under a strategy that includes a greater focus on defense clients.
